texts.hit: The {} sinks its yellow teeth into your leg.
texts.death: The {} squeals and goes still.

texts.hit: The {} flutters in and nips you.
texts.death: The {} drops out of the air.

texts.hit: The {} jabs you with a rusty shiv.
texts.death: The {} crumples with a final snarl.

texts.critical_hit: The {} lashes out, hitting you squarely in the stomach. You double up in pain.
texts.hit: The {} delivers a fierce punch.
texts.death: The {} falls to the ground with a grunt.

texts.hit: The {} rakes you with bony claws.
texts.death: The {} clatters into a heap of bones.

texts.hit: The {} claws at you, reeking of rot.
texts.death: The {} collapses into foul sludge.

texts.hit: The {} sinks its dripping fangs into you.
texts.death: The {} curls up, legs twitching.

texts.hit: The {} slings a stone that cracks against you.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s stone clatters off the wall.
texts.death: The {} drops its sling and slumps over.

texts.critical_hit: The {} brings its club down in a bone-shaking smash!
texts.hit: The {} swings a heavy club into your side.
texts.death: The {} topples like a felled tree.

texts.hit: The {} drains the warmth from your bones.
texts.missed_hit: The {} passes through the air where you stood.
texts.death: The {} dissipates with a hollow wail.

texts.critical_hit: The {} rakes you with all three claws in a spray of blood!
texts.hit: The {} tears at you with hooked claws.
texts.death: The {} lets out a final, earth-shaking roar.

texts.critical_hit: The {} vomits a jet of searing flame! Your skin blisters.
texts.hit: The {} lashes you with a tendril of living fire.
texts.missed_hit: The {} scorches the floor where you stood.
texts.death: The {} collapses into smouldering cinders. The Shard of Flame glows red.

texts.critical_hit: The {} drives a fist of solid granite into you with bone-crushing force!
texts.hit: The {} smashes you with a limb of living stone.
texts.missed_hit: The {} pounds the flagstones where you stood, splitting them.
texts.death: The {} cracks apart with a thunderous groan. The Shard of Stone lies exposed.

texts.critical_hit: The {} tears through your mind as much as your flesh — reality swims!
texts.hit: The {} reaches through the dark and rakes cold fingers across you.
texts.missed_hit: The {} dissolves into shadow where you strike, reforming behind you.
texts.death: The {} unravels with a hollow shriek. The Shard of Shadow is yours.

texts.hit: The {} strikes you.
texts.death: The {} goes limp.

texts.hit: The {} bites you.
texts.death: The {} whimpers and falls.

texts.critical_hit: The {} sinks its fangs into your throat!
texts.hit: The {} tears at you with flashing teeth.
texts.death: The {} dissolves into shadow.

texts.critical_hit: The {} cackles as hellfire licks your skin!
texts.hit: The {}'s claws rake you, trailing embers.
texts.missed_hit: The {} darts back with a fiendish grin.
texts.death: The {} pops into a puff of brimstone.

texts.critical_hit: The {} tears into you, leaving a blazing wound!
texts.hit: The {} rends you with claws of black iron.
texts.missed_hit: The {}'s blow whistles past your head.
texts.death: The {} roars and crumbles into ash and cinder.

texts.hit: The {} jabs at you with a crude knife.
texts.death: The {} squeals and drops.

texts.hit: The {} jabs you with a hooked dagger.
texts.death: The {} shrieks as it crumbles.

texts.hit: The {} claws at you with gnarled hands.
texts.death: The {} splits in two as it falls!
